content.content:
Layer 0 - Framework for building custom blockchains with modular governance, validation, and application logic.
CometBFT (Consensus Engine)
High throughput without POW energy costs
Inter-Blockchain Communication Protocol
Each sovereign chain and zone exchange verified data and tokens without centralized intermediaries.

Layer 1(s) - Country (Name) Sovereign Compliance & Anchoring Chain
Role: Legal + technical anchor with master government agreements.
What it does: Enforces methodologies and issuance rules, anchors verified MRV hashes, and mints data for credit issuance to a standard (ITMO, Verra, Gold, ICYCM, A6.4er)
Interfaces: IBC channels to every zone; APIs for registries and national reporting

Layer 2 — Mission Control / Governance Engine
Role: Operational core for verification, aggregation, and reporting.
PoV validation: 50% AI (CV, GPS/timestamp checks, anomaly detection) + 50% human (audits, disputes, randomized QC).
Functions: SOP enforcement, role permissions, cross-project aggregation (CPA/PoA), data enrichment (satellite/weather/soil), metrics & BTR/NDC reporting.
Outputs: Compliance-ready datasets routed to L1 for issuance; dashboards for administrators and buyers.

Layer 3 —  Universal-access Applications & MRV Tools
User-friendly field apps: KYC/FaceID, GPS mapping, photo/video/sensor capture, offline sync.
Verifier consoles: Review queues, escalation, audit trails.
Buyer/investor portals: Browse verified credits, impact telemetry, purchase history.
Oracles & integrations: Drone/satellite/IoT feeds; REST/GraphQL APIs for ESG platforms, travel offsets, and government systems.

The Problems

1. Outdated, Manipulable Data
Paper-based MRV can be altered and lacks an immutable record.
2. Farmers Excluded
No recognized proof of work or impact for government/project payouts.
3. Fraud & Middlemen
Costly brokers control compliance packaging, enabling manipulation.

The Solutions
1. Immutable Data Anchoring (Layer 1)
AI + human PoV validates MRV and anchors it to a sovereign chain.
2. Direct Recognition for Farmers (Layer 3)
Simple, offline-ready apps create proof-of-record and track impact.
3. Automated Compliance Packaging (Layer 2)
Aggregates and formats verified data, removing the need for brokers.
